notes: Smallest tool-less round-trip pinning the terminal-text end signal for Mistral Vibe: one user prompt, one assistant reply with non-empty content and no tool_calls, asserting the ready→working→ready arc and final ready. Vibe writes messages.jsonl under ~/.vibe/logs/session/<id>/ (FilesUnderRoot, session id from the directory), so the whole arc keys to a single session row — no transcript-UUID rollout phase, anchored to start UNPINNED so a transient proc-<PID> presession can't steal the birth. The end signal is the terminal role:assistant line with no tool_calls → parser.go maps it to turn_done with AssistantText=TruncateAssistantText(content) (parser.go:67-75), IsAgentDone()=true, classifier rule 2b fires working→ready. model+context_tokens come from the meta.json sidecar (config.active_model, stats.context_tokens); the daemon surfaces no cost for Vibe (session_cost is never read). Overlaps intentionally with basic-turn — this cell pins the end-signal mechanism. Final state = ready.
source: .specs/agent-scenarios.md → Feature: Turn end via terminal text

text: User prompt drives ready → working (role:user → user_message)
Terminal role:assistant line with content and no tool_calls maps to turn_done → state to ready (rule 2b via IsAgentDone)
